---
title: "About the author"
subtitle: "Xavier Clemente García Cevallos"

about:
  template: trestles
  image: icon/xavier.jpg
  image-shape: round

  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/xavierclementegarcia

    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/xavier-clemente-garc%C3%ADa-cevallos-b4727a206/

    - text: '<img src="https://investigacion.udca.edu.co/wp-content/uploads/2018/04/cvlac.svg" alt="CVLAC" style="width:20px;height:20px;">'
      href: https://scienti.minciencias.gov.co/cvlac/visualizador/generarCurriculoCv.do?cod_rh=0002018236

    - text: '<img src="https://info.orcid.org/wp-content/uploads/2019/11/orcid_16x16.png" alt="ORCID" style="width:20px;height:20px;">'
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-3284-2363
---

### About the author 

**Xavier Clemente García Cevallos** is a biologist and researcher student whose work focuses on computational drug discovery, cheminformatics, bioinformatics, natural products, and neurobiology. His research integrates experimental phytochemistry with *in silico* approaches, including molecular docking, ADMET profiling, molecular dynamics, and software development for reproducible computational workflows. He is the developer of **ADMETShiny**, an open-source R package designed to facilitate the analysis and visualization of molecular descriptors and ADMET properties.
